title: No Upgrade Teamplate Dupe
description: remove the netherite upgrade template recipe , giving the netherite armor/tools the work they deserve
body:
# **No Netherite Upgrade Template – Datapack**

This datapack removes the Netherite Upgrade Template crafting recipe,
preventing players from crafting it through vanilla methods 

- Netherite progression is intentionally slowed down
Upgrading gear to Netherite now requires more effort and progression, making it a true late-game goal.

###  Core Features:

- Removes the Netherite Upgrade Template recipe

- Netherite upgrades are no longer easily accessible early-game

- Designed to make Netherite feel more valuable and rewarding

###  Intended Gameplay Impact:

- Encourages exploration of high-risk structures (such as Bastions or other dangerous areas)

- Motivates players to engage more with combat and progression

- Gives players clear long-term goals instead of fast upgrades

###  Why use this datapack?

- Adds challenge without changing core game mechanics

- Extends survival progression naturally

- Makes Netherite an achievement, not a shortcut

- Suitable for Survival, Hardcore, and long-term worlds


<details>
<summary>Click me</summary>

Netherite is for those who dares to explore the deepest places of hell.

</details>
